overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character walking through a rainy, foggy urban park at night. The character navigates past a neon-lit station entrance, through debris-filled alleys, covered scaffolding walkways, and tree-lined park paths with atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk and alleyway near neon-lit station entrance

events.description: character turns corner from building facade into narrow debris-filled alleyway
exits narrow alley into open park area with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily with flashlight in hand, navigating wet pavement and debris near the station

entered.detail: red neon sign reading STATION mounted above a building entrance
dark brick wall with posters and graffiti running along the sidewalk
yellow glowing street lamp illuminating the rain and fog
leafless trees silhouetted against the foggy background at the park edge

segments.scene_description: The segment begins near a building with a glowing red STATION neon sign, following the character as they walk along a brick wall and turn into a narrow, debris-filled alleyway. The character emerges from the alley at the end of the segment into an open park area with scattered trees visible through the heavy rain and fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered construction scaffolding walkway with corrugated metal roof

events.description: character enters covered scaffolding walkway with metal roof overhead

agents.ego_description: character walks through the narrow covered walkway, flashlight beam illuminating the metal scaffolding poles

entered.detail: metal pipe scaffolding with corrugated metal roof creating a covered walkway tunnel
stacked cylindrical barrels or containers stored under the scaffolding

segments.scene_description: The character enters a temporary covered walkway formed by construction scaffolding with a corrugated metal roof overhead. The space is narrow and enclosed by metal poles on both sides, with construction barrels visible to the left, providing shelter from the heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy urban park with scattered trees and walking paths

events.description: character exits covered scaffolding back into open park area
character briefly enters second covered scaffolding structure

agents.ego_description: character walks through the open park, navigating around trees and benches while rain continues to fall

entered.detail: wooden park bench visible through the fog on the right side of the path
second temporary metal scaffolding walkway briefly entered near the end of the segment

segments.scene_description: Exiting the scaffolding, the character continues through a wide-open park area with scattered trees and benches visible in the fog. The path is littered with fallen leaves and debris. Near the end of the segment, the character briefly passes through a second covered scaffolding structure before continuing into the park.

scene_state.functional_zone: park path approaching commercial district with neon signage

events.description: yellow neon LIQUOR sign becomes visible on approaching building facade

agents.ego_description: character continues walking through the park approaching a lit commercial building with visible neon signage

entered.detail: vertical yellow neon sign reading LIQUOR mounted on the building facade
low-rise commercial building with illuminated windows and multiple neon signs

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking through the remaining park area as commercial buildings come into view ahead. A prominent yellow neon LIQUOR sign becomes visible on a building to the left, and the vegetation becomes sparser as the character approaches the urban commercial edge of the park.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic urban alleyway into a rain-swept park that eventually leads back toward a commercial district. It begins beside a building marked by a glowing red station sign, following the character as they navigate a narrow, debris-filled alley before emerging into an open park area shrouded in heavy rain and fog. The scene then shifts as the character seeks shelter within a narrow, corrugated metal scaffolding walkway lined with construction barrels, only to exit back into the wide parkland where fallen leaves and benches are scattered through the mist. After passing through a second brief scaffolding structure, the camera continues forward as the dense vegetation thins and the environment opens up. Finally, the park gives way to the urban edge, where commercial buildings appear and a prominent yellow liquor sign glows in the distance.
